breeds.name: Tuxedo
breeds.description: Black and white coat, giving the appearance of a tuxedo. They're often playful and friendly.

breeds.name: Tortoiseshell
breeds.description: Black, brown, and orange patched coat. Almost all female are have unique personalities/temperaments.

breeds.name: Calico
breeds.description: Tri-color coat pattern of black, white, and orange. Like tortoiseshell cats, almost all are female. Known for vibrant personalities.

breeds.name: Sphynx
breeds.description: Known for hairless and visible skin, but have a peach fuzz layer. Known for being affectionate and playful. Without a coat, they need more attention to body care by owners.

breeds.name: Maine Coon
breeds.description: Large breed with usually long, heavy coats. They're known for being very affectionate and gentle, close personalities to dogs.

categories.title: Cat Behavior
items: Scent is important for territorial marking for. Cats head bunt or rub their cheeks on surfaces; their scent glands are located there.
A purr is often a sign of content or comfort, but sometimes can be of stress as well to self-soothe
Tails show a lot. An upright tail with a small curve shows confidence. When britled out, it is excitement or fear.

categories.title: Fun Facts
items: Cats walk similarly to camels and giraffes: both right feet firsst, then left.
They can rotate ears 180 degrees and have 32 muscles in each, allowing for super-hearing
Cats sleep 12–16 hours a day. For kittens, they sleep up to 20 hours a day
